all.en: We are pleased to announce that our headquarters will be moving to a new location next month.
all.zh: 我們很高興宣布公司總部將於下個月遷移至新地點。

all.en: The new office is situated on the fifteenth floor of the Crestwood Business Tower downtown.
all.zh: 新辦公室位於市中心克瑞斯伍商業大樓的十五樓。

all.en: This relocation reflects our continued growth and our commitment to a modern workplace environment.
all.zh: 這次搬遷反映了公司持續的成長以及對現代化工作環境的承諾。

all.en: The new premises offer approximately thirty percent more space than our current office building.
all.zh: 新辦公室較目前的辦公大樓多出約百分之三十的空間。

all.en: Employees will enjoy improved meeting rooms, quiet zones, and a fully equipped staff lounge.
all.zh: 員工將享有改善的會議室、安靜區，以及設備齊全的員工休息室。

all.en: An on-site cafeteria will serve breakfast, lunch, and afternoon refreshments at subsidized prices.
all.zh: 現場餐廳將以優惠價格供應早餐、午餐與下午茶點。

all.en: The official move will take place during the weekend of June fourteenth and fifteenth.
all.zh: 正式搬遷將於六月十四日及十五日的週末進行。

all.en: Professional movers have been hired to transport furniture, computers, and personal belongings.
all.zh: 我們已雇用專業搬運公司負責運送家具、電腦與個人物品。

all.en: Each employee will receive a labeled crate for personal items by the end of next week.
all.zh: 每位員工將於下週末前收到一個貼有標籤的個人物品收納箱。

all.en: Please ensure all confidential documents are sealed and clearly marked before pickup day.
all.zh: 請於收件當日前將所有機密文件密封並清楚標示。

all.en: Any unwanted items should be placed in the designated recycling bins on each floor.
all.zh: 不需要的物品請放置於各樓層指定的回收箱中。

all.en: Workstations at the new location have already been assigned according to team requirements.
all.zh: 新址的辦公座位已根據各團隊需求完成分配。

all.en: A detailed floor plan will be shared through the human resources portal this Friday.
all.zh: 詳細的樓層平面圖將於本週五透過人資入口網站分享。

all.en: The new address is 88 Crestwood Avenue, and the nearest subway station is Central Park.
all.zh: 新地址為克瑞斯伍大道八十八號，最近的地鐵站為中央公園站。

all.en: Underground parking is available, but spaces must be reserved through the facilities team.
all.zh: 地下停車場可供使用，但車位須透過總務團隊預約。

all.en: Employees who commute by bicycle can use the secure bike room on the basement level.
all.zh: 騎自行車通勤的員工可使用地下層的安全停車間。

all.en: Shower facilities will also be available for those who exercise during lunch breaks.
all.zh: 也設有淋浴設備供午休時運動的同仁使用。

all.en: Our official phone numbers will remain the same after the relocation is completed.
all.zh: 搬遷完成後公司的官方電話號碼將維持不變。

all.en: However, the main reception desk will move to a new direct line listed on the intranet.
all.zh: 不過，總櫃台將改用內部網站上公告的新直撥號碼。

all.en: Mail forwarding from the old address will be in place for six months after the move.
all.zh: 舊地址的郵件轉寄服務將於搬遷後維持六個月。

all.en: On Monday, June sixteenth, all staff are expected to report to the new headquarters.
all.zh: 六月十六日星期一，請全體同仁至新總部報到。

all.en: A welcome breakfast will be served in the main atrium between eight and ten o'clock.
all.zh: 上午八點至十點將於主中庭提供歡迎早餐。

all.en: Should you have any questions, please reach out to the relocation committee at any time.
all.zh: 若有任何疑問，歡迎隨時聯繫搬遷委員會。

all.en: Thank you for your cooperation as we transition into this exciting new chapter together.
all.zh: 在我們共同邁向這令人興奮的新篇章之際，感謝大家的配合。
